summary: Verification testing after major structural refactoring: backend server.py split into modular routers (database.py, helpers.py, schemas.py, routers/*.py) and frontend TenantsPage.js decomposed into tenant/ components. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load and function correctly.

console_warnings.issue: HTML nesting warnings: <span> inside <tbody>, <thead>, <tr>, <table> - caused by Emergent editor dynamic wrapper (x-ve-dynamic), NOT application code. Same as previous iteration - no functional impact.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring verified: backend modular routers all working (properties, tenants, leads, notifications, budgeting, calendar_router, operations, parking, info, admin). Frontend decomposed tenant components (TenantFormDialog, TenantDetailDialog, TenantDeleteDialog, MiscChargesSection, tenantUtils) all work correctly. Note: Budgeting pages route prefix changed from /deposits to /budgeting/deposits and /income to /budgeting/income - tested with correct paths.

features_tested.GET /api/calendar/timeline: PASS - has properties, range_start, range_end, today
features_tested.Tenants page loads with tabs: PASS - shows 'Current & Future Tenants' tab and 'Past Tenants' tab
features_tested.Add Tenant opens TenantFormDialog: PASS - form opens with all required fields
features_tested.Clicking tenant row opens TenantDetailDi: PASS - shows tenant details, Edit Tenant button
features_tested.Budgeting Deposits page 3 tabs: PASS - Current Deposits, Past Deposits, Landlord Deposits all visible
features_tested.Income page loads with monthly data: PASS - shows yearly total ($43,061.57), current month, monthly breakdown
features_tested.Calendar page loads: PASS - shows Occupancy Timeline with tenant booking bars
features_tested.Notifications page loads: PASS - shows kanban board with UPCOMING, IN PROGRESS, DONE, REASSIGNED, ARCHIVED columns
